name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in the contracts, verifier, or signal tools
title: ""

---

## Summary

A clear description of the bug.

## Component

- [ ] contracts
- [ ] verifier
- [ ] signal
- [ ] other

## Reproduction

Steps, commands, and inputs that trigger it. Include the commit hash.

## Expected vs actual

What you expected, and what happened.

## Environment

Foundry / Node versions, OS, and the network (testnet / mainnet) if relevant.

> Do not report security vulnerabilities here. See SECURITY.md.
